title: PaymentMethod

remote_id.description: The third-party API ID of the matching object.

created_at.description: The datetime that this object was created by Merge.

modified_at.description: The datetime that this object was modified by Merge.

method_type.description: The type of the payment method.

is_active.description: `True` if the payment method is active, `False` if not.

remote_updated_at.description: When the third party's payment method was updated.

description:
# The PaymentMethod Object
### Description
The `PaymentMethod` object defines how a payment against an invoice is made.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `GET PaymentMethod` endpoint and view payment method information.
